---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for Nous Companion
title: "[Feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Summary
A clear and concise description of the feature or improvement.

## Motivation
Why is this needed? What problem does it solve?

## Detailed Description
Describe the feature in detail. If it involves UI, describe the expected flow.

## Affected Areas
Which parts of the architecture would this touch?
- [ ] Tauri desktop shell (always-on-top, window chrome, edge snapping)
- [ ] Renderer (Canvas2D/WebGL, visual effects, lip-sync)
- [ ] Python backend / WebSocket server
- [ ] Hermes observer / session integration
- [ ] Compositor / animation system
- [ ] Brain / LLM quip generation
- [ ] TTS engine integration (OmniVoice, OpenAI TTS, Edge-TTS)
- [ ] Character system (expression groups, sprites, personality, voice references)
- [ ] Settings UI
- [ ] Scene player / `.nous-scene.json`
- [ ] Character export/import (`.nous-companion-character.zip`)
- [ ] Other: ___

## Proposed Behavior
Describe how the feature should work. Examples:
- New setting or toggle (e.g., a new visual effect, chrome style, or TTS option)
- New character system capability (e.g., new expression group type, idle frame behavior)
- New WebSocket message or backend behavior
- New integration with Hermes Agent

## Alternatives Considered
Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context
Add mockups, references, or anything else that helps explain the request.
